title: Glimmer Cradle Live2D Emotion Map
description: 单个形象模型的情绪到 expression / motion / mouth-param 映射。实际路径由模型注册表声明。

model.description: 稳定模型标识，必须与模型注册表条目一致，不要求等于目录名。

expressions.description: Emotion type → expression id. Use null for 'no expression change'.

motions.description: Emotion type → motion group id. Empty / unknown emotion falls back to 'idle'.

mouth.description: Optional mouth-open parameter for lip sync.

intensity_scale.description: Multiplier applied when driving mouth open from emotion intensity (0 disables emotion-driven mouth).
